name: STARBUCKS CORP
summary: Starbucks Corporation is the premier roaster, marketer, and retailer of specialty coffee, operating in 89 markets. The company sells handcrafted coffee, tea, and other beverages, high-quality food items, and licensed products through company-operated stores, licensed stores, and grocery and foodservice channels. Brands include Starbucks Coffee, Teavana, Ethos, and Starbucks Reserve. It also licenses trademarks through its Global Coffee Alliance with Nestlé.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
